nodes.label: ADR 0001: Dual-path ingest for attendance-machine sync
nodes.rationale: A cloud web app can't reach attendance hardware behind a school's router. Rather than requiring every school to own push-capable (ADMS-style) hardware, support two ingest paths into the same per-School attendance API endpoint: (1) devices that push logs directly, and (2) a local bridge agent that polls LAN devices for schools whose hardware can't push. Avoids forcing hardware upgrades while not building a permanent on-site-agent dependency for schools with newer equipment.
